title: CI Matrices, Required Checks, Caching, and Merge Policy · Failure Case: Job Graph
summary: Build a secure required-check workflow across supported environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates job graph increment in a required CI quality-gate workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Order cheap discriminating checks before expensive matrices while preserving useful parallelism.
Separate trusted branch workflows from untrusted pull-request code and secrets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Job Graph evidence

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Defend the Job Graph model
